name: Casual Bricks Breaker VR
summary: Blast through bricks in a vibrant 3D cosmos! Experience the classic arcade thrill in VR with Casual Bricks Breaker VR. Aim, shoot, and watch your balls bounce off cosmic bricks in an immersive, star-filled environment. With intuitive controller-based aiming and endless levels of physics-based fun, master the cosmic blast and climb the leaderboards!
